name: Ham Loaves
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine pork, ham, bread crumbs, eggs and milk.
2. Shape into 12 ovals, using 1 cup of mixture for each loaf.
3. Place the loaves in an ungreased baking pan.
4. Combine brown sugar, water, vinegar and mustard; pour over the loaves.
5. Bake, uncovered, at 350°F for 1 hour and 15 minutes, basting every 15 to 20 minutes.
6. Place the loaves on a platter and spoon some of the sauce over them.
